name: unmark_objects
short_description: Unmark items that are currently marked
full_help:
unmark_objects

Description: 
Unmark items that are currently marked

Syntax: 
unmark_objects  [-color_index <arg>] [-rgb <args>] [-color <arg>] [-quiet]
                [-verbose] [<objects>]

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  [-color_index]  Color index
  [-rgb]          RGB color index list
  [-color]        Valid values are red green blue magenta yellow cyan and 
                  orange
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<objects>]     Objects to unmark

Categories: 
GUIControl

arguments.description: Valid values are red green blue magenta yellow cyan and orange
Suspend message limits during command execution
